approach: Workstream-based — not phase-numbered. Definitions before build. Dashboards after data truth.

meeting_decisions.agreed_pipeline: Lead → Qualifying → Referral in Progress → Active → Discharged; Dropped Off anytime before Active
meeting_decisions.short_term_care: Parallel track with icon UI until authorized; then Active on main pipeline
meeting_decisions.crm_gate: Finalize labels + flowcharts before Avi tech implementation; one-pass update planned
meeting_decisions.supersedes: Prior 3-stage Referral → Active → Discharged UI draft — reconcile at Avi meeting

program.name: Link Homecare — CRM Operating Model Rebuild
program.scope: NY Operations first; Florida adapts after NY stable

goals.name: Trustworthy census and pipeline reporting
goals.success_metric: True active census ~1,200–1,300 reconciled; authorized inflation (~1,960) eliminated from leadership views

goals.name: Clear lead-to-patient workflow for every team
goals.success_metric: Any user can identify lead vs referral vs active patient in ≤3 seconds without multi-click drill-down

goals.name: Clean data foundation for scalable growth
goals.success_metric: Referral source, drop reason, and conversion reporting reliable enough for LeadTrap/Meta/campaign decisions

project.name: CRM Status Architecture Rebuild
project.start_condition: Keren has Schema Manager access; no production CRM changes until Framework v1 signed
hard_gates: Framework v1 signed → CRM build may begin
Baseline recorded → migration batches may run
Staging remediation validated → dashboards may switch
UAT passed → production cutover may proceed

milestones.task: Baseline audit complete — all counts recorded
Remediation validated — census gap acceptable on staging
UAT passed — sales and ops sign-off

sections.name: Governance & Project Setup
sections.purpose: Charter the program, assign roles, schedule decisions, establish rules of engagement

tasks.name: Confirm project charter and success criteria
subtasks: Align on 3 program goals (census truth, workflow clarity, growth readiness)
Document non-negotiables: definitions before dashboards; no prod changes pre-sign-off
Link workspace doc: crm/Link-Homecare-CRM-Status-Architecture-Execution-Workspace.md

tasks.name: Confirm team roles and RACI
subtasks: Keren — framework, audit, UAT coordination
Joel — operational definitions, ops sign-off, playbooks
Avi — CRM implementation, remediation, automations
Angelo — sales UAT
Leah — cutover communications

tasks.name: Schedule definitions workshop (90 min)
subtasks: Send pre-read: alignment-meeting/01-share-with-team.md
Confirm attendees: Joel, ops leads, Keren, Avi, Angelo
Use facilitator guide: alignment-meeting/05-phase0-workshop.md
Capture decisions in alignment-meeting/03-decision-worksheet.md

tasks.name: Establish change control rules
subtasks: No production CRM changes until Framework v1 signed
CRM field work on hold until status labels + flowcharts finalized (Leah confirmed)
Old fields retained during migration; no immediate deletion
Dashboards not switched until staging data validated
Manual review queues for ambiguous legacy records
Plan one-pass CRM update: labels + filtering + backfill together

tasks.name: Joel: Schedule CRM implementation review with Avi's team
tasks.depends_on: Finalize patient status labels and lifecycle flowcharts
subtasks: Coordinate with Avi on tech team availability
Agenda: agreed pipeline, short-term parallel track, multi-LOB UI, NIA tracking, one-pass plan
Pre-read: crm/meeting-notes/2026-07-pipeline-alignment.md + crm/glossary-pipeline-v2.md
Capture technical mapping questions for Nexus Episode fields

tasks.name: Leah: Follow-up and coordinate Avi meeting scheduling
tasks.depends_on: Finalize patient status labels and lifecycle flowcharts
subtasks: Send follow-up messages via team chat with meeting outcomes
Coordinate calendar once labels and flowcharts are finalized
Confirm enrollment specialist representation if needed

sections.name: Business Definitions & Sign-Off
sections.purpose: Lock language, lifecycle, layers, edge cases — blocks all CRM build

tasks.name: Refine CRM glossary and terminology (living doc)
subtasks: Maintain crm/glossary-pipeline-v2.md with meeting feedback
Define: Lead, Qualifying, Referral in Progress, Active, Discharged, Dropped Off
Retire ambiguous labels: Pre-Intake, Closed, Converted, generic In Progress / Intake as master status
Document short-term parallel track terms: In Progress, Accepted, Startup, Authorized
Mark each term: Known / Assumption / Needs confirmation

tasks.name: Finalize patient status labels and lifecycle flowcharts
subtasks: Main pipeline flowchart: Lead → Qualifying → Referral in Progress → Active → Discharged
Show Dropped Off as terminal before Active from any prior stage
Short-term care parallel track + icon UI spec (does not affect main bar until authorized)
Multi-LOB simultaneous status display wireframe
Joel + Leah sign-off — unlocks Avi tech meeting and CRM build

tasks.name: Confirm master lifecycle model (Jul 2026 alignment)
subtasks: AGREED: Lead → Qualifying → Referral in Progress → Active → Discharged
AGREED: Dropped Off anytime before Active
AGREED: Referral in Progress replaces in progress / intake as master label
Confirm Episode as master object; map 5 stages to Nexus fields at Avi meeting
Confirm Authorized is not top-level status — validity layer under Active
Enrollment specialists assign and update statuses

tasks.name: Confirm layer separation model
subtasks: Layer 1: Episode.status — master lifecycle
Layer 2: Episode.leadStage — referral funnel
Layer 3: Intake.status — LOB process (not master status)
Layer 4: Authorization.status — validity (not census)
Layer 5: Patient LOB — service-line status
Layer 6: Medicaid ticket — orthogonal track
Layer 7: Episode.outcome — terminal reason
Layer 8: Follow-up / hold / recycle dates

tasks.name: Resolve edge case decision log (20 scenarios)
subtasks: NIA failed → Dropped Off; re-apply after ~180-day wait (Joel confirming exact period)
Authorization received but no SOC started
Auth expired but patient still receiving care
One LOB dropped, another active
Short-term sent to third party (Girling)
CDPAP post–April 1, 2025 cohort
Returning former patient — new Episode vs reopen
Voided vs dropped intake
Medicaid deferred vs dropped off
Primary LOB when multiple intakes open

tasks.name: Confirm census definition
subtasks: Define: Episode Active + valid AUTH_APPROVED + confirmed SOC on gold LOB
Choose source of truth: Billing vs EVV vs CRM vs hybrid
Confirm Active threshold: SOC required vs cleared-to-start
Exclude: CDPAP sunset, third-party referrals, short-term-only lead loss

tasks.name: Export and sign off ReferralOutcome picklist
subtasks: Export current ReferralOutcome values from Schema Manager
Group into referral-drop reasons vs discharge reasons
Require outcome on Dropped Off Referral and Discharged
Joel signs final picklist values

tasks.name: Document LOB eligibility criteria matrix
subtasks: MLTC: Medicaid + qualifying diagnosis (dementia, brain injury, etc.)
Custodial: Medicaid + developmental delay
Short-term: skilled need + Medicare/Medicaid
NHTD, OPWDD, Private Pay checklists
Note: dynamic LOB light-up UI as planned Phase 2 enhancement

tasks.name: Simplify drop reasons to ~10 categories
subtasks: Draft list in crm/glossary-pipeline-v2.md
Replace overly long current picklist
Joel signs final ~10 values before ReferralOutcome export
Map old drop reasons to new categories for backfill

tasks.name: Joel: Confirm NIA re-application waiting period
subtasks: Confirm 180-day estimate from meeting
Document appeal process (unlimited appeals noted)
Define CRM follow-up bucket for failed NIA after wait period

tasks.name: Document short-term care integration rules
subtasks: NH discharge planner as primary referral source
Parallel statuses: In Progress, Accepted, Startup, Authorized
Icon-only UI until authorized — does not affect main pipeline metrics
On authorized: promote to Active on main pipeline
If not authorized: main status may stay Dropped Off or Discharged

tasks.name: Sign Status Framework v1
tasks.depends_on: Finalize patient status labels and lifecycle flowcharts
subtasks: Compile signed glossary (pipeline v2), flowcharts, LOB matrix, drop reasons, NIA rules
Publish to Teams + repo
Joel ops sign-off + Leah comms alignment + Avi technical feasibility
Unlock Joel → Avi implementation review meeting and CRM Build workstream

sections.name: Current State & Data Baseline
sections.purpose: Measure how much the CRM is lying today — quantify before remediation

tasks.name: Schema Manager object inventory
subtasks: Episode — 92 fields; document EpisodeStatus, leadStage, outcome
Patient — 278 fields, 53 picklists; document legacy status fields
Intake — 130 fields, 24 picklists
Authorization — 66 fields; document baseStatus STRING risk
Identify which objects share LeadStatus picklist

tasks.name: Map Nexus objects to audit queries
subtasks: Retarget crm/audit/data-integrity-audit.sql from persons → Episode/Patient/Intake/Authorization
Document Query Console equivalents
Create baseline recording template in workspace doc

tasks.name: Run distribution baselines
subtasks: Episode.status distribution (New, Lead, Active, Converted, On Hold, Dropped, Discharged)
leadStage distribution — especially all-In-Progress on Leads list (~56)
Episode.status = Converted — export for manual review
Authorization baseStatus STRING value distribution

tasks.name: Run integrity baselines — critical cohorts
subtasks: Orphan authorized — no valid AUTH_APPROVED (census inflation driver)
Authorized + dropped/voided intake pairs
Episode Active without valid authorization (Ntelekos pattern)
CDPAP remediation queue (post 2025-04-01)
Third-party referrals counted as patients (Girling)
Pre-intake and closed legacy counts on Patient picklists
Multi-intake open conflicts on single record
Short-term-only pipeline on sales views
Stale anticipated SOC (passed date, no confirmed SOC)
12+ months no service but still authorized/active
Medicaid deferred > 30 days

tasks.name: Record census gap baseline
subtasks: Document dashboard authorized count
Document estimated true census
Calculate and record gap (~760 records)
Identify top 3 drivers of gap from audit cohorts

tasks.name: Export manual review batch IDs
subtasks: Converted Episode IDs
Active without valid auth IDs
Discharged but never was Active IDs
Dropped but had Active history IDs
Per nexus-episode-status-map.json manual_review_queries

tasks.name: Baseline audit complete — all counts recorded
subtasks: Fill Data Integrity Audit Matrix in workspace doc
Review counts with Joel — confirm remediation priority order
Unlock Data Remediation workstream

sections.name: Target Architecture & Migration Design
sections.purpose: Translate signed definitions into build-ready specs for Avi

tasks.name: Finalize status architecture tables
subtasks: Master lifecycle: entry/exit conditions, allowed transitions
Referral sub-status rules
Intake status per LOB
Authorization validity rules
LOB/service-line status rules
Invalid transitions list

tasks.name: Complete old-to-new status mapping
subtasks: Episode.status migration (New/Lead/Converted/On Hold → Referral)
LeadStatus migration (retire Converted)
Patient legacy: pre-intake, closed, authorized
Classify each: safe auto / conditional / manual review / deprecate
Update crm/schema/nexus-episode-status-map.json

tasks.name: Define required field matrix
subtasks: Referral / New and In Progress required fields
Dropped Off Referral required fields
Active entry required fields (SOC, LOB, coordinator)
Discharged required fields
On Hold required fields (replaces Pre-Intake)
Map to crm/schema/validation-rules.ts

tasks.name: Draft dashboard logic spec
subtasks: Leadership: true census, authorized pipeline, drop/discharge by reason
Intake: pending NIA, Medicaid, auth, overdue follow-ups
Operations: expiring auth, non-authorized active, SOC issues
Growth: source attribution, conversion, drop by source
Map to crm/audit/dashboard-queries.sql

tasks.name: Publish Implementation Brief for Avi
subtasks: Picklist values from crm/schema/enums.json
Field definitions and UI recommendations
Validation rules and transition rules
Migration safety rules and rollback plan
Open technical questions list for Avi

sections.name: CRM Build — Staging
sections.purpose: Implement new picklists, UI, and rules in staging — no prod changes

tasks.name: Episode picklist rebuild
subtasks: Implement 5-stage pipeline: Lead | Qualifying | Referral in Progress | Active | Discharged
Add Dropped Off as terminal before Active
Map legacy EpisodeStatus values per signed flowchart
Deprecate Pre-Intake, Closed, Converted, ambiguous In Progress labels
Short-term parallel status fields + icon display (separate from main bar)

tasks.name: Authorization picklist migration
subtasks: Create Authorization status picklist (replace baseStatus STRING)
Map existing STRING values to picklist
Link picklist to intake and LOB timeline widget

tasks.name: Episode UI updates
subtasks: Progress bar: Lead → Qualifying → Referral in Progress → Active → Discharged
Short-term care icon (parallel track — not on main bar until authorized)
Per-LOB status chips when multiple LOBs open
Sub-status on Active: Authorized / Non-Authorized (computed)
Require outcome modal on Dropped Off and Discharged
Hide legacy Patient status fields from layout

tasks.name: Validation rules — blocking saves
subtasks: Dropped Off Referral requires outcome
Discharged requires outcome + discharge date
Discharged only from Active (was-ever-active check)
leadStage cleared/hidden when Active or Discharged
Service-line drop ≠ Episode discharge unless last active LOB + confirm dialog

tasks.name: Automations
subtasks: Authorization save → recalc Active sub-status + LOB timeline (Ntelekos fix)
Nightly auth expiry → flag Active Non-Authorized + alert
NIA failed → ON_HOLD + 6-month hold_until + re-engage task
SOC confirmed → Episode ACTIVE
SLA timers: lead 24h, follow-up 3d, referral→intake 7d, auth→SOC 14d

tasks.name: Staging build complete
subtasks: Demo to Keren + Joel — walk through one record per lifecycle stage
Confirm picklists, UI, rules, and automations working
Unlock Data Remediation on staging

sections.name: Data Remediation & QA
sections.purpose: Clean staging data to match new architecture; validate before dashboards

tasks.name: Build staging migration script
tasks.depends_on: Baseline audit complete — all counts recorded
subtasks: Implement nexus-episode-status-map.json rules
Safe automatic batches first
Conditional batches with flags
Manual review queue export for ambiguous records

tasks.name: Migrate Episode statuses
subtasks: New / Lead / Converted / On Hold → REFERRAL + leadStage
Dropped → REFERRAL + Dropped Off Referral + outcome
Active → compute Authorized vs Non-Authorized from auth
Discharged → retain + require outcome backfill

tasks.name: Remediate legacy Patient picklists
subtasks: pre-intake → Referral In Progress + hold badge
closed → manual split: Discharged vs Dropped Off Referral
person-level authorized → remove from display; compute from auth layer

tasks.name: Run specialty remediation batches
subtasks: CDPAP sunset cohort — discharge or drop per signed rule
Third-party referrals (Girling) — Dropped Off + THIRD_PARTY_REFERRAL
Orphan authorized — clear or flag Non-Authorized
Voided/dropped intakes — clear authorized display
leadStage = None — backfill from Episode.status
leadStage = Converted → In Progress Referral

tasks.name: Re-run baselines on staging
tasks.baseline_metric: Census gap closed vs Phase 1 baseline
subtasks: Compare all audit cohort counts to baseline
Document remaining exceptions and accept/reject each
Confirm orphan authorized → target 0 on census widget

tasks.name: Ops review — 50 remediated records
subtasks: Sample across LOBs: LTC, NHTD, OPWDD, private pay, short-term
Sample edge cases: NIA hold, CDPAP, third-party, multi-LOB
Confirm status labels match operational reality
Document any corrections needed before dashboard rebuild

tasks.name: Remediation validated — census gap acceptable on staging
subtasks: Joel signs ops acceptance on remediation sample
Gap within agreed threshold documented
Unlock Dashboard rebuild

sections.name: Dashboards & User Acceptance
sections.purpose: Rebuild reporting on clean data; validate with sales and ops

tasks.name: Rebuild Leads / Referral list view
tasks.depends_on: Remediation validated — census gap acceptable on staging
subtasks: Show pipeline stage: Lead / Qualifying / Referral in Progress (not generic In Progress)
Add intake opened date and LOB to list view
Filters: NIA upcoming, NIA passed/failed, qualifying stage, dropped cases
Short-term icon column without affecting main status sort
Automated list ordering by status and eligibility priority

tasks.name: Rebuild leadership widgets
subtasks: True census widget: Active + valid auth + SOC (~1,200–1,300)
Authorized pipeline widget (separate from census)
Active Non-Authorized / expired auth risk widget
Referral funnel: New / In Progress / Dropped by leadStage

tasks.name: Rebuild ops queues
subtasks: Expiring authorizations (30-day window)
Stale anticipated SOC queue
Active patients missing required fields
Multi-LOB conflict review queue

tasks.name: Rebuild growth / funnel reporting
subtasks: Drop/discharge by Episode.outcome + referral source
Referral-to-active conversion by source and LOB
Geography and campaign trends (when attribution fields clean)

tasks.name: QA — zero orphan authorized on census widget
subtasks: Run census widget query against staging
Confirm 0 rows matching orphan authorized pattern
Document any accepted exceptions with Joel sign-off

tasks.name: Sales UAT — Angelo
subtasks: Can identify lead vs referral vs patient in ≤3 seconds
Leads list shows meaningful funnel granularity
Drop reasons visible without deep drill-down
Sign UAT checklist or log defects

tasks.name: Ops UAT — Joel + intake leads
subtasks: NIA hold workflow works without Pre-Intake label
Auth recalc updates LOB timeline immediately
LOB drop does not accidentally discharge patient
Sign UAT checklist or log defects

tasks.name: UAT passed — sales and ops sign-off
subtasks: Compile UAT results and defect resolution
Written sign-off from Angelo (sales) and Joel (ops)
Unlock Production Go-Live

sections.name: Production Go-Live
sections.purpose: Cut over production with safety controls and post-launch monitoring

tasks.name: Final go/no-go review
tasks.depends_on: UAT passed — sales and ops sign-off
subtasks: Confirm staging census gap within threshold
Confirm rollback plan documented
Confirm comms sent to sales + ops + intake
Go/no-go decision recorded

tasks.name: Schedule and communicate migration window
subtasks: Announce window to sales, intake, ops, leadership
Document what changes for each team on day 1
Provide support channel during cutover

tasks.name: Execute production remediation batch
subtasks: Run validated migration script from staging
Process manual review queue with Keren + Joel
Verify sample records post-migration

tasks.name: Enable production rules and automations
subtasks: Enable validation rules
Enable auth save → recalc automation
Enable nightly auth expiry alerts
Enable SLA timers

tasks.name: Switch production dashboards and list views
subtasks: Activate new census widget
Activate new Leads/Referral list
Hide legacy authorized counts from leadership default view
Archive old dashboard definitions (do not delete)

tasks.name: Post-cutover census validation
subtasks: Re-run census gap audit on production
Compare to baseline and staging results
Document final counts for leadership

tasks.name: Production live — census gap closed
subtasks: Leadership briefed on new census number
Old authorized dashboard retired from default views
Begin 2-week hypercare monitoring

tasks.name: Hypercare monitoring (2 weeks)
subtasks: Monitor auth recalc — no Ntelekos regressions
Monitor SLA alert volume and false positives
Daily check-in with sales and intake for label confusion
Log and triage defects

sections.name: Documentation, Training & NY Playbook

tasks.name: Publish NY Status Framework v1 (canonical)
subtasks: Final glossary and lifecycle diagram
Per-team quick reference: sales, intake, ops, leadership
Edge case handling guide
Store in Teams + repo

tasks.name: Update department playbooks
subtasks: Intake playbook — replace Pre-Intake with On Hold workflow
Sales playbook — referral sub-status and drop reasons
Ops playbook — auth expiry and non-authorized active handling
Angela playbook revision

tasks.name: Conduct team training sessions
subtasks: Enrollment specialists — 45 min: Qualifying vs Referral in Progress, NIA filters, dropped cases
Sales training — 30 min: pipeline stages and short-term icon
Ops training — 30 min: census, auth expiry, LOB drop vs discharge, multi-LOB view
Record sessions for onboarding

tasks.name: Deprecate legacy fields (write-block only)
subtasks: Write-block deprecated EpisodeStatus values
Write-block LeadStatus Converted
Hide legacy Patient status picklists permanently
Plan intake field reduction (130 → target; no deletion yet)

tasks.name: Florida delta checklist
subtasks: Document NY vs FL CRM differences
Identify which status rules transfer unchanged
Note LeadTrap/Faith Healthcare integration (crm/leadtrap/)
Estimate FL adaptation effort

sections.name: Growth Enablement

tasks.name: Confirm growth readiness prerequisites
subtasks: Referral source field standardized and populated
Drop/discharge outcomes required and populated
Conversion reporting validated on 30-day cohort
No orphan authorized on growth-facing views

tasks.name: UTM and campaign attribution standards
subtasks: Define required UTM parameters for web forms
Map to Episode source fields in CRM
Document naming convention for campaigns and events

tasks.name: Website forms → CRM integration audit
subtasks: Confirm new leads land as Referral / New Referral
Confirm source attribution preserved
Test end-to-end from form submit to Leads list

tasks.name: LeadTrap / Ava integration
subtasks: Map bot qualification to Referral sub-status transitions
Ensure drop reasons flow to Episode.outcome
Conversion reporting: qualified referral → active patient

Build drop reason by campaign report

Geography trends by partner

tasks.name: Growth dashboard — qualified referral → active patient
